action.reasoning: Observation: Empty workspace, need to build full pipeline. Analysis: iWildCam is a spatial OOD task with long-tailed classes; CLIP ViT-L/14 provides strong pretrained features. Decision: Build CLIP-based classifier with class-balanced sampling, train 3 epochs for baseline, submit eval to measure iteration time.
action.command: cd /data && ls -la && head -5 train.txt && head -5 val.txt && wc -l train.txt val.txt
